## Active Files

- `references/source-evaluation.md`: external source trust and safety checks

- `references/comparison-rules.md`: compare external candidates with local skills without confusing style differences for defects

- `agents/openai.yaml`: UI-facing metadata

- `SKILL-before-upgrade-2026-03-07.md`: snapshot before the discover-learn-compare-upgrade redesign

- Maturity: `enhanced`
- Governance status: no loose root backups detected; active routing files are classified and aligned with `agents/openai.yaml`

- `2026-03-07 helper scripts`: added candidate intake and upgrade-level classification scripts
- `2026-03-07 validation`: upgrade tests passed, review reported no major issues, and validator passed
- `2026-03-09 install hardening`: removed workspace-pinned test paths and recorded installation-ready governance status before promoting the skill into `~/.claude/skills`
